settings.title: Level 1 Experience
settings.description: In this 75 to 90-minute study, we will assess your comfort preferences by evaluating various pillow heights and mattress comfort levels.

settings.title: Level 2 Experience
settings.description: In this 90-minute to 2-hour study, we’ll gather detailed data for our state-of-the-art fitting room and conduct a thorough assessment of your comfort preferences on our four distinct comfort levels.

settings.title: Book Your Product Study Today
settings.caption: Discover the power of personalized sleep when you sign up for a one-on-one sleep analysis with our team of experts—and take home a FREE Performance® Pillow just for participating.

settings.title: Welcome to the BEDGEAR Sleep Lab
settings.caption: Step into the BEDGEAR Sleep Lab for an exclusive pillow and mattress fitting experience that will transform your sleep forever. This fitting room experience utilizes cutting-edge AI technology to perform 500,000 precise calculations on your body and determines your precise personalized fit for your very own BEDGEAR Performance® Pillow and Mattress.

settings.title: Receive $100 Gift Card Upon Completion Of Product Analysis
settings.caption: Ready to turn your influence into income? Join the Bedgear Affiliate Program today and start earning commissions on high-quality products your audience will love.

settings.heading: $100 gift card as a token of our appreciation

settings.title: Find Your Fit
settings.caption: Guided by our expert Sleep Coach, you'll experience a personalized process of discovering the perfect pillow and mattress needed to match your individual needs and completely optimize your sleep experience. Sign up now to elevate your sleep to the next level.

settings.title: Book Appointment
settings.text: Secure your spot in the BEDGEAR Sleep Lab today!

settings.title: Personalized Fitting Experience
settings.text: During a one-on-one session with a trained Sleep Coach, you'll test different firmness levels and pillow sizes to find the perfect combination for you. Once completing your sleep analysis, your Sleep Coach will provide personalized recommendations for your very own optimized sleep system, and a complimentary Performance® pillow ($199 value), will be shipped to you.

settings.title: Friendly Staff
settings.text: At BEDGEAR, you can expect more than just expert sleep advice. Our friendly staff is dedicated to making your Sleep Lab experience as comfortable and enjoyable as possible, always ready to answer all your questions so we can better help you discover your personalized sleep solutions with a smile.

settings.title: Complimentary $100 Gift Card
settings.text: As a thank you for participating in our sleep analysis and fitting room experience, you will receive a FREE $100 Gift Card (valid and redeemable at any retailer) from BEDGEAR within 5-10 days of completing your product analysis and accompanying survey.

settings.title: Certified Sleep Scientists
settings.text: BEDGEAR® Sleep Scientists are at the forefront of utilizing innovation and technology to optimize your sleep experience. With meticulous attention to detail, our team applies cutting-edge fabric technologies and ergonomic design principles to create ultra-breathable bedding that is personalized to fit your specific body type, sleep position, and temperature preference.

settings.question: How long will it take?
settings.answer: The Process will require approximately 90 minutes to complete.

settings.question: Is it a Bedgear gift card or a visa gift card?
settings.answer: The gift card provided is a Visa gift card, which can be used for any purchase.

settings.question: What do I wear to the Sleep Lab?
settings.answer: You will receive an email detailing the exact clothing that is approved for participants.

settings.question: What happens after the fitting process?
settings.answer: Following the fitting process, you'll receive our complimentary Storm pillow, valued at $199. Expect an email shortly after to confirm your delivery and email address. Your gift card will then be dispatched within 5 to 7 business days. Thank you for choosing us for your comfort needs!

settings.title: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.text: Quick Answers to questions you may have.
settings.content_text: Can't Find what you're looking for?

settings.title: CONTACT US
settings.subtext: Tell us your needs, and we’ll contact.
